summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WG Check-in webapp inline editing features. All core functionality working correctly including manual editing, settings management, and template integration.
passed_tests: Manual detail inline editing (edit button -> input fields -> save -> read-only)
Settings room editing (name and color changes with persistence)
Settings check-in template editing with save functionality
Settings check-out template editing with save functionality
New booking integration uses updated room names and templates
All backend API endpoints (stays, manuals, settings) working correctly
Template preview in booking dialog shows updated content
Success notifications for all save operations
Proper state management between edit and read-only modes
